title: dasyochloa longiglumis
intro: Dasyochloa longiglumis is a species of flowering plant in the grass family, Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant is said to have health benefits like reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Dasyochloa longiglumis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in herbal remedies.
